prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic shot of a handsome young man with spiky dark brown hair and rectangular glasses, wearing a black leather tactical jacket with a high collar, silver chest badge, and white arm stripes along with black leather gloves and an earpiece. He is leaning intensely over a glowing tactical map on a table, pointing at it with his right hand. The scene takes place in a dimly lit, gritty concrete command bunker. In the blurred background, several soldiers in full black tactical gear and helmets stand at attention. The shoulder of another person in a black uniform is visible in the foreground left, framing the shot. The image features dark, moody lighting, shallow depth of field, and high-resolution gritty textures.
